title: 10 best herbal teas for anxiety
description: Piper methysticum, also known as kava, teas helps with anxiety because its active compounds, such as kavalactones, interact with the brain's GABA receptors. This interaction increases the production of the neurotransmitter GABA, which has a calming effect on the nervous system. As a result, kava tea can promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety levels, and improve overall mood.
